summary: Comprehensive testing of NodeGuard GSC dashboard. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI loads correctly with Bloomberg Terminal dark aesthetic. All core features functional. Minor HTML hydration warning in FailureTable.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML hydration warning: <span> as direct child of <tbody> — React wraps mapped <tr> rows in a span which is invalid HTML. Browsers may auto-correct but causes console warnings.

issues: Could not verify catastrophe banner visually in UI because backend test uploaded a CSV with ρ≈0.19 which reset the kernel. The banner code logic is correct and would trigger when ρ>0.80.

action_items: Fix FailureTable: wrap mapped <tr> rows directly in <tbody> without intermediate <span> wrapper (move .map() directly inside <tbody>)
Catastrophe mode banner: verify manually with original dataset (ρ≈0.82) after backend is restarted (hot reload will reinitialize kernel)
critical_code_review_comments: FailureTable: React key warning and HTML hydration error - <span> being injected between <tbody> and <tr> — this happens when using map() inside a JSX fragment or wrapper. Should map directly or use React.Fragment with key prop.
server.py uses @app.on_event('startup') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI versions — should use lifespan context manager instead.
MIMIKernel.warehouse_metrics() iterates ['A','B','C','D','F'] but misses block 'E' if data has it — minor data completeness concern.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all core features working, minor HTML warning

seed_data_creation: Test uploaded a 50-row CSV via /api/kernel/upload during backend testing which reset the kernel state. Backend restart will reinitialize with original ρ≈0.82 catastrophe dataset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully tested and working. Frontend UI functional with dark mode. Key areas: catastrophe banner (verify with original dataset after restart), FailureTable HTML hydration warning. PDF export button is clickable. Recovery counter auto-increments every 4s. 5 KaTeX LaTeX formulas render correctly.
rca_of_issue: FailureTable hydration error: React renders <span> wrapper around dynamic content inside <tbody> causing invalid HTML nesting. Fix: ensure .map() returns <tr> elements directly as children of <tbody> without any wrapper element.
